data.content:
Implementation review fix complete for Claude approval support.

Branch: codex/foolery-94da-claude-approvals
New commit: e826e6c5 test(adapter): preserve coverage in focused files
Prior implementation commit: 39fe8f69 feat(claude): support approval prompt launch mode
Worktree: /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-94da

Change summary:
- Restored/preserved the old adapter coverage by splitting it into focused files instead of leaving reviewers to infer it from a large partial deletion.
- `agent-adapter-dialect-prompt.test.ts` now carries the previous `resolveDialect` coverage plus Claude/Codex/Copilot/Gemini prompt-mode arg coverage, including baseline Claude model behavior.
- `agent-adapter-codex.test.ts` now carries the previous Codex normalizer event/completion/error coverage.
- `agent-adapter-copilot-gemini.test.ts` continues to carry the previous Copilot/Gemini normalizer coverage.
- `agent-adapter.test.ts` remains as the small Claude passthrough normalizer suite.
- New Claude approval launch/config tests remain in `claude-approval-launch-args.test.ts`; Claude approval fixture assertions remain narrowly scoped.

Verification:
- bun run test src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter-dialect-prompt.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter-codex.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/agent-adapter-copilot-gemini.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/claude-approval-launch-args.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-visibility.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-runtime.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/settings-agents.test.ts
- bun run lint
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run build
